retrieved_result: The Story Behind the Story of Frozen The Story Behind the Story of Frozen“Every once in a while, a movie comes along where it starts to tell you what it needs to be,” says Producer Peter Del Vecho of his recent project, Walt Disney Animation Studios’ Frozen. “And this is one of those movies.”The film is loosely based on the Hans Christ
